results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Four-event Apr 9-16 cluster: FL AG FSU-shooting investigation, stalking-victim lawsuit with ignored internal mass-casualty flag, new FSU details, and active lobbying for SB 3444 AI liability shield

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Gang state-collapse confirmed: 6.4M need aid, 1000% rise in child sexual violence since 2023, response plan 24% funded — composite confirmed at floor

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Fourth-year anniversary Apr 15 confirms floor score; UN relief chief calls it 'abandoned crisis'; Berlin $1.5B pledged but plan 16% funded

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: NM $375M verdict (Mar 24) + MA SJC Section 230 ruling (Apr 13) + CA MDL trial confirm Critical band; delta below threshold

results.name: Chevron
results.key_finding: CO $1.53M Noble Energy penalty + CA climate-disclosure lawsuit confirm Critical band; delta trivial

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: BAND CHANGE (Developing -> Critical). First NLRB bargaining order against Amazon (4-year illegal conduct finding) + Palmdale settlement cuts off precedent

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: HRW Apr 14 aid-blockade finding against state forces offset by Geneva peace talks signing Apr 16; delta trivial

results.name: Johnson & Johnson
results.key_finding: 3rd bankruptcy rejected, $7B settlement offer withdrawn, $50M March mesothelioma verdict; confirms Apr 15 downgrade, within noise

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: 5-org humanitarian scorecard + OHCHR Apr 16 statement confirm ceasefire failing (700+ killed, 180+ children); score near floor

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Maduro capture Jan 3 + 621 political prisoners released; but 87+ new detentions, persecution machinery intact; delta below threshold

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Apr 15 public opposition to SB 3444 (OpenAI-backed liability shield) + support for stricter SB 3261 represents governance-positive signal

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: NAACP CAA lawsuit Apr 14 (Earthjustice + SELC co-counsel) confirms near-floor assessment; 27 unpermitted turbines in majority-Black community

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Tariff 1-year review (89K manufacturing jobs lost, $2.5K/household cost) + Medicaid $911B cuts (446 hospitals at closure risk) + USAID dismantling

results.name: Alphabet (Google)
results.key_finding: AdX remedy ruling still pending (Brinkema deadline passed by 2+ weeks); no new material evidence; Apr 16 downgrade stands

results.name: Boeing
results.key_finding: Barnett family settlement $50K ($30K net to family) for wrongful-death claim = material AB5 failure signal; score unchanged from Apr 15 assessment

results.name: CVS Health
results.key_finding: BAND CHANGE (Functional -> Developing). DOJ opioid False Claims Act lawsuit + $290M Caremark Medicare settlement + $45M LA 2026 settlement; published 50.0 materially overstated

results.name: Cigna Group
results.key_finding: PxDx algorithmic claims denial (300K denials/2 months, avg 1.2s per denial) + Congressional probes; score confirmed in Critical band

results.name: Iceland
results.key_finding: Nordic welfare model confirmed; UN Independent Expert flagged migrant/disability/trans gaps being addressed; NHRI established

results.name: Sweden
results.key_finding: Migration policy tightening (asylum at 1985 low; $34K repatriation grant) is EQU/INT drag; Exemplary band maintained

results.name: Switzerland
results.key_finding: Confirmed at published score; Ukraine S status extended; humanitarian hub role maintained
